page.title: Wall of fame
page.subtitle: Every cup score, award, and certification, bound to the lot that earned it. Append-only and chain-verified.

empty.title: No accolades on the books yet
empty.description: Cup a lot, win an award, or earn a certification and it lands here, bound to the lot that earned it and impossible to quietly edit.

detail.subtitle: This lot's accolade ledger. Append-only, every entry chained to the one before it.
detail.timelineEmpty: No accolades on this lot yet. Record the first one on the right.

verify.verifiedHint: Every entry hashes onto the last. The history checks out end to end.
verify.brokenHint: An entry's hash does not match. The ledger has been tampered with.

compose.title: Record an accolade
compose.immutable: Once recorded, an accolade can't be edited. A correction posts a revision row instead.

revise.title: Revise a cup score
revise.supersedes: This posts a new revision row. The original stays on the ledger, marked superseded.
revise.none: No cup score to revise yet. Record one first.

errors.kindRequired: Pick what kind of accolade this is.
errors.scoreRange: A cup score must be between 0 and 100.
errors.accoladeRequired: Pick the cup score to revise.
errors.generic: Could not record that accolade. Check the entry and try again.
errors.reviseGeneric: Could not post that revision. Check the score and try again.
